Review only the changes introduced by this pull request.

Compare the pull request head with its base branch and report actionable findings only. Prioritize correctness, regressions, security, accessibility, responsive behavior, React and TypeScript maintainability, loading/empty/error states, and portfolio readability.

For every finding, include severity, file path, relevant line, why it matters, and a concise recommended fix. Do not modify files. If there are no actionable findings, say so clearly. Keep the final review concise and write it in Korean.
